operations.rationale: Agent Layer now ships a Claude Code status line (model, reasoning effort, context %, weekly usage limit, directory, git branch/dirty state, lines changed, session cost). Defaults to disabled, so a non-interactive upgrade keeps it off. Choose true to enable it; that seeds a missing editable .agent-layer/claude-statusline.sh source, sync copies it to .claude/claude-statusline.sh, and sync wires statusLine into .claude/settings.json. Choose false (the default) to keep it disabled; you can change agents.claude.statusline in .agent-layer/config.toml at any time.

Agent Layer now ships a Codex native status line fragment. Defaults to disabled, so a non-interactive upgrade keeps it off. Choose true to enable it; that seeds a missing editable .agent-layer/codex-statusline.toml source and sync merges its [tui].status_line list into .codex/config.toml unless agents.codex.agent_specific.tui.status_line is explicitly set. Choose false (the default) to keep it disabled; you can change agents.codex.statusline in .agent-layer/config.toml at any time.
